domitor.relationship_summary: A devoted, overly-attached ghoul who curates Julien’s nights and emotional stability—indispensable, and dangerous.

first_contact.context: Met Julien at an art showing shortly after his Embrace; she fixated on him and inserted herself into his orbit.

bond.blood_bond_notes: Jennifer’s loyalty is supernatural and chosen; she frames it as devotion and necessity, not servitude.

awareness.knowledge_notes: Understands practical danger and secrecy. Knows ‘court’ exists and that attention can be lethal, but lacks faction literacy.

presentation.style_summary: Retro-cool thrift elegance; looks older than she is; blends into art spaces like she belongs.
signature_items: Goodwill ‘retro’ dress that passes at gallery events
Small crossbody bag with sketchbook, cigarettes, and spare cash
presentation.demeanor_public: Quiet, watchful, politely deferential—until Julien is threatened.

public_profile.cover_story: A young gallery regular who ‘helps out’ and knows people. Sometimes introduced as Julien’s assistant when it’s useful.

hidden_profile.false_identity_notes: Passes as 18 socially; no formal documents. Uses confidence, wardrobe, and event culture to avoid scrutiny.

domitor_awareness_of_truth.notes: Julien assumes she is a young adult; he avoids details that would force him to look too closely.

mechanics.concept: Runaway-turned-ghoul who curates her domitor’s life and quietly controls access to him.

skills.name: Drive
skills.notes: Can drive in a pinch; not her core role.

skills.name: Security
skills.notes: Basic habits: doors, exits, who’s watching.

knowledges.name: Academics
knowledges.notes: Patchy schooling; learns what she needs.

knowledges.name: Investigation
knowledges.notes: Knows everything about Julien; keeps tabs quietly.

powers.name: Potence (Level 1)
powers.notes: Expressed as sudden grip strength / short bursts of force.

backgrounds.name: Herd
backgrounds.notes: Not her asset; Julien’s feeding web is separate.

merits.name: Enchanting Voice
merits.notes: Soft, persuasive when she wants it.

flaws.name: Runaway
flaws.notes: No safe home; history is a trap.

flaws.name: Obsessive
flaws.notes: Fixation on Julien crosses healthy lines.

flaws.name: Dark Secret
flaws.notes: Actual age is 15; discovery is catastrophic.

health.notes: Healthy, wiry; stress shows first as insomnia.

derived_stats.notes: Derived values are placeholders; rules/agents should compute authoritative values.

dependency.notes: Jennifer’s identity is bound to Julien; separation escalates quickly into risky behavior.

risks.risk_notes: If her actual age becomes known, it becomes a political weapon and moral crisis with Masquerade implications.

to_domitor.notes: She frames protection as care; she controls access to Julien when she thinks it’s necessary.

others.notes: Tolerates him as coterie proximity; watches for manipulation.
Sees Sarah as a threat to her role as Julien’s anchor.

notes.one_liner: Julien Roche’s devoted ghoul—retro-cool, watchful, and uncomfortably indispensable.
notes.expanded: A runaway who learned to pass as older to survive, Jennifer slipped into Phoenix art spaces on thrift-store elegance and raw instinct. She met Julien just after his Embrace and fixated immediately. Now she curates his unlife—schedules, access, moods—while insisting she’s simply helping. She knows everything about him, and the bond has turned devotion into a quiet, controlling gravity. Julien does not know she is fifteen. When that truth surfaces, it will not be a private problem.
notes.st_only: Use her as a soft gatekeeper NPC: she notices PC intentions first; she can redirect, delay, or ‘help.’ Escalation track: (1) harmlessly helpful, (2) quietly obstructive, (3) protective sabotage, (4) desperate exposure to an elder for ‘help,’ (5) catastrophic age reveal.
